title: Blueprint Command Console
concept: A V2 Playground console with the live WordPress browser protected on the left and a right inspector centered on Blueprint search, URL runs, JSON editing, ZIP replacement, save identity, and transfer history.
focus: stateful import, export, save, and destructive flows
neutral WordPress admin palette with blue, green, amber, and red state accents
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start
WordPress PR preview
Gutenberg PR or branch preview
GitHub import with account connection and token caveat
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with validation and replacement warning
Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest representative subset label
Selected Blueprint detail with tags
Blueprint JSON editor with dirty and validation state
Blueprint copy link, download bundle, and run actions
Save in this browser
Save to a local directory
Save progress state
Saved, local, and temporary Playground differences
Saved Playground open, rename, delete confirmation, and final deleted state
Current shell path input and refresh
Homepage and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, saved, local, ZIP import, PR preview, and Blueprint result identity states
Settings with WordPress, PHP, language, older versions, network, multisite, reset, and reload consequences
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, selected editor, dirty state, and save result
Database driver, SQLite path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with empty and warning states
GitHub export with connection and result
Download as zip with progress and generated result
Transfer history for imports, exports, saves, downloads, and destructive actions

title: Runtime Control Room
concept: A large live WordPress browser paired with a right runtime inspector that makes version, PHP, language, network, multisite, reset, reload, save, and portability consequences visible on the same active Playground object.
featureCoverage: create vanilla WordPress Playground
create from WordPress PR
create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub with account connection
run Blueprint URL
import .zip with replacement confirmation
browse and filter a labeled subset of the 43-entry Blueprint gallery
select featured Blueprint entries and run them
save temporary Playground in browser storage
save to a local directory
show save progress for browser and local destinations
show selected local folder identity and reload permission consequence
browse saved and unsaved Playgrounds
rename a saved Playground
delete a saved Playground with confirmation and fallback state
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh active embedded WordPress page
open Homepage and WP Admin
edit WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network, and multisite settings
communicate destructive reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
file browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, selected editor, dirty state, and save result
view, copy, download, validate, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
download database.sqlite
open Adminer and phpMyAdmin
inspect Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs
export to GitHub
download active Playground as .zip
record transfer history for GitHub, ZIP, Blueprint, database, and import actions
